name: Javina || Curious Love
description:
✧*̥ ̊"The world slows down when we're together..."*̥ ̊✧

.・。.・ ゚✭・.・✫・ ゚・。..・。.・ ゚✭・.・✫・ ゚・。.

Hello my beautiful darling babes! I'm back with a Valentine's day bot!!🥳🥳" But rawr, it's literally February 19th, Valentine's Day was the 14th-" Yeah yeah, I know😒. I started working on this bot on Valentine's Day when I heard about the event, HOWEVER COMMA! I changed the plot like halfway through cause I thought Javina's story/plot would fit Valentine's day theme more accurately, so....here we are🥰

Okay so, a small update about me, yeah? If you don't care, then you can scroll and interact with the bot. Okay, so I started college in January (late January, and I started a new semester) and I'm not gonna lie...shits taking me out😭. Got professors posting assignments back to back, gotta study every free chance I get, I'm literally either always studying or always napping (I'm always napping even before college but whatever 🙄 I'm a sleepy baby okay😭). So because I gotta focus on college more, my posting schedule will be even more out of wack that how it was, sorry about that.

"Rawr, you don't even post that of-" yeah I know, you don't have to remind me babes 😭. I got bots in the works and bot ideas ready to be created. I'll try my best to get them released so you darlings can be fed.

Anyways, love you guys always, kisses and thank you so much for over 700 followers ( I fucking love you guys omg😭). Drink water, eat healthily, I want you all to live long lives🥰 Love you all my lovely babes😘

.・。.・ ゚✭・.・✫・ ゚・。..・。.・ ゚✭・.・✫・ ゚・。.
